hero.description: Front-End Programmer Analyst with experience in Angular, React and Java. Committed to clean code, punctuality and development best practices.

experience.title: Experience
experience.metric_years_desc: Since Aug 2021 in banking, consulting and e-commerce
experience.metric_projects_desc: Legacy platforms to React for Scotiabank
experience.metric_users_desc: In production with React Hook Form at Scotiabank
experience.quote: Committed to clean code and best practices. Open to new challenges that allow me to innovate and explore new technological frontiers.
experience.aside_text: Over 4 years building digital products in banking (Scotiabank), consulting (MC Asesoría) and e-commerce. Each stage with measurable results and modern technologies.

stack.title: Stack
stack.subtitle: The tools I work with every day to build scalable, high-quality products.

about.lead: I'm Jorge Baños, a Front-End Semi-Senior Programmer Analyst based in Lima, Peru. I specialize in Angular and React, with additional backend experience in Java and Python.
about.body1: I've worked on banking projects for Scotiabank (platform migrations to React), CRM system development with Angular + Java, and WordPress/Magento platform maintenance. I excel at JSON design and manipulation, REST API integration, and agile methodologies.
about.body2: Outside of code, I'm interested in UI/UX design with Figma, clean software architecture, and continuing to grow as a Systems Engineer at UPN. Open to new challenges that allow me to innovate.

contact.subtitle: I'm available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. Let's talk and see how I can help you.
